narrative:
Defiance City 2-D (precinct in Defiance County) has 1,210 registered voters, with 62.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
